TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Kelun/lankel-senayliyase/pin-cuwan-wan/tacinsini-alsayke nilaculan Kelun/lankel-senayliyase/pin-cuwan-wan/tacinsini-alsayke "kamu nu ing-ku: luane / Wrangell-St Elias / Glacier Bay / Tatshenshini-Alsek" u milakuwitay tu nu kanatal asi-tung . (ŤčĪŤ™ě:Kluane / Wrangell-St Elias / Glacier Bay / Tatshenshini-Alsek) . u eneng nida i amilika atu kanata nu lilis nu yi-kung , alaseciya, atu pulitin-ke-lunpiya a kitidaan. tinisa idaw ku tatelunan nu sulsuldaan a sapilacil atu tatangahan nu sulsuldaan tu aadihan , imahinisa idawku yadahay a kasienawan a adupan atu macelahay a tumay ngabul tabakiay ku ngawa aside tini naming mueneg , 1979 amihcaan , pulung nu kanatal u sapasubana u masakaputay nisubelidan a masakaputay wiyni sa apacumuden i kitakit nu helak sananay a nusubelidan a zaysang . u hamin nu ahebal nu pala sa 32,000,000 a ing-mu "130,000 acubu nu kuli mikaka aca . pakayni nu pulung a kanatal masakaputay 1972 amihcaan idaw ku patecek nuheni tu "sapisikul tu kitakit nu lalangwan atu mucelakay a nisubelitan azaysang nikasasulit" kitakit subelidtan a zaysang mutudu' tu tademaw idawku tatelungan nu lalangawan atu mucelakay a salacul nu nisubelidan a zaysang nu sapamata . hina adihay a lalangawan nu nisubelidtan a zaysang pasu malumanay " u nisangaan aluma', nalimaan misang tu cancanan, usulit" masaluyaluyay a lumalumaan, nisubeludan a kitidaan, " nikutkutan a kitidaan" u celak sananay a nisubelitanwiyni sa u micidekay a cancanan atu maudipay nu sisapilaculay nu mucelakay a kitidaan nu wayway , u lala' atu mucelakay nu kitidaan masasuala; "u tahinaay tu a canan nu kitidaan nu cancanan" at uke-siy,sapisikul, mucelakay u bangcal nida idaw naming ku sapilacul nu niwci . Amilika nayi 1973 a mihcaan 12 abulad 7 ademiad patucek sa tinakawaw masasulit , ina kanatal nucelakay atu lalangawan nu masubeliday a kitidaan kyu idaw ku kasenegan micumud i " kitakit nu tungus singanganay" . 1978 amihcaan 9abulad , tini i huwa-sen-tun-ke-lun-pi-ya sapasubana' acuda nu masakaputay nu kitakit nisubelidan tu zaysang a wiy-yun- huy sakinatusa milubang , u amilika sayaway misulul tu tusaay a zaysang nu nisubelitan amaala "kitakitzaysang nu singanganay" malacal tu hu-te-tay-ti- nu kanatal aaidangan atu takuliyaway aaidangan . katukuhayda 2024 amihcaan , u amilika idaw ku 26 akitidaan nu aaidangan makaalatu kitakit nu nisubelitan a lalangawan a nisubelitan a xaysang, 12 ku ciit mucelakay nusubelutan , aay mapapulung ku ni subelitan a zaysang . sabalihayay a maalaay tini i pu-li-heng nu mu-la-wiy-ya a kitidaan u milakuwiytay a nisubelitan a zaysang , 2024 amihcaan mapatucek tu . ina kanatal idaw 17 ku nialesan a zaysang maalaay atu mipalasul a situngusay . takuliyaway aaidangan nayi 1995 amihcaan katukuh 2003 amihcaan mapacumud " amalawpesay a nisubelidan nu kitakit a zaysang patungusan tu ngangan" nadikudan sa alesan naca , u tabakiay a lanulanu'an nayi 1993 amihcaan katukuh 2007 amihcaan mala amalawpesay tu , nadikudan sa caayaca pusiyawi ; nika i 2010 amihcaan , nu aaidanga u nanum atu mulangaway matulin mahica hakiya , pasayni tu i bayu' kunicelakan milaecus tu nikaudip nu bayu'ay a cacanan , kyu u sapasubana' nu masakaputay lungucan nu amilika a siyhu ya aaidangan mala u amalawpesay tu sa , matulin katukuh ayda . . u sulsuldaan a aaidangan nu kanatal ŚÜįŚ∑ĚÁĀ£ŚúčŚģ∂ŚÖ¨Śúí aaidangan nu kanatal sulsuldaan "Glacier Bay National Park" kitidaan nu pala 330 emang a kubu , paasu masalikelunay mangangiway a buyubuyu'an , u musaungayay a sulsuldaan , udihekuay a hinaudaday a kulakilangan , aadupan nu dadipasan tu ilabuay nu bayu' , u sapalikat tu nu alaseciya nu labuay a dadan . . tiniay aaidangan u nu kitakit celak sananay a nisubelidtan a zaysang kuyni , ina nisubelidtan a zasang u palanida 2500 a kubu , nu kitakit satabakiay a nu kanatal a sasikulan a kitidaan nu cacayay . . sen-yi-lay-ya-se "idaw ku sulit; sen-ay-li-ya-se atu senyi-li-ya-se" yanikasapu'cu nu buyubuyu'an , atu nikatatungdu nu buyubuyu'an , bangacal aadihan inayaytu kumahiniay kakapah, sisa mahini kyu u tiding nu buyubuyu'an nu dicem sakatalawan ku talakaw nida , mipuut tu namaka tay-pin-yangay a nika suemet nu bali a demiad , kyu nikasaupu nu sulda talakaw, kya malasulsuldaan maminkutungdu nu buyu', salengac sa ku tungudu nu buyu' kapah aadihan . lankel-senayliyase a kanatal nu aaidangan atu sasikulan " kamu nu amilika; Wrangell‚ÄďSt. Elias National Park and Preserve" , tini i amilika alaseciy nu kanatal a aidangan , nipatidengan i 1980 a mihcaan , u satabakiay nu amilika aaidangan nu kanatal, 53,321 cubu a kuli ku ahebal malakuwit ku takuliyaway a kanatal nu aaidangan nu enem nu talakaw . :Wrangell‚ÄďSt. Elias National Park andPreserve), . lankel-senayliyase a kanatal atu salaadan tu duma nu Kanata-keluwani a kanatal nu aaidangan atu niliwanan a lala palecad han nu pulung nu kanatal nimutudu' mala kitakit nu nisubelidan a zaysang . aaidangan naw bukbuklalan kuyadahay, sisa u tayniay midang cakadayum . . idaw ku tu adadan cayay henay tamakai u ba'ba'tuwan henay nika katukuh iaaidangan , cay kahini acacay u katuuday a labang sa u hikuki kukacawan nuheni. lankel-senayliyase a kanatal nu aaidangan ya ngangan namakayca namaky nu amilika sakatusa a talakw , u talakaw sa 5,489 a depah nu senay-liya a buyu . Ťė≠ś†ľÁąĺ- . labu nu aaisangan idaw ku tabakiay aadupan , sulsuldaan, balad atu silamalay a buyu' mahini kuy tiniay a kaku nu buyu' . .
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == k…ôr~…ĺun/r~…ĺank…ôr~…ĺ-s…ônajr~…ĺijas…ô/pin- ¶uwan-wan/ta ¶insini-ar~…ĺsajk…ô nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan k…ôr~…ĺun/r~…ĺank…ôr~…ĺ-s…ônajr~…ĺijas…ô/pin- ¶uwan-wan/ta ¶insini-ar~…ĺsajk…ô "kamu nu iŇč-ku: r~…ĺuan…ô / wraŇč…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ-st …ôr~…ĺias / gr~…ĺa ¶i…ôr baj / tatsńß…ônsńßini-ar~…ĺs…ôk" u mir~…ĺakuwitaj tu nu kanatar~…ĺ asi-tuŇč . (**:kr~…ĺuan…ô / wraŇč…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ-st …ôr~…ĺias / gr~…ĺa ¶i…ôr baj / tatsńß…ônsńßini-ar~…ĺs…ôk) . u …ôn…ôŇč nida i amir~…ĺika atu kanata nu r~…ĺir~…ĺis nu ji-kuŇč , ar~…ĺas…ô ¶ija, atu pur~…ĺitin-k…ô-r~…ĺunpija a kitidaan. tinisa idaw ku tat…ôr~…ĺunan nu sur~…ĺsur~…ĺdaan a sapir~…ĺa ¶ir~…ĺ atu tataŇčańßan nu sur~…ĺsur~…ĺdaan tu aadińßan , imańßinisa idawku jadańßaj a kasi…ônawan a adupan atu ma ¶…ôr~…ĺańßaj a tumaj Ňčabur~…ĺ tabakiaj ku Ňčawa asid…ô tini namiŇč mu…ôn…ôg , **** amińß ¶aan , pur~…ĺuŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ u sapasubana u masakaputaj nisub…ôr~…ĺidan a masakaputaj wijni sa apa ¶umud…ôn i kitakit nu ńß…ôr~…ĺak sananaj a nusub…ôr~…ĺidan a zajsaŇč . u ńßamin nu ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu par~…ĺa sa **,***,*** a iŇč-mu "***,*** a ¶ubu nu kur~…ĺi mikaka a ¶a . pakajni nu pur~…ĺuŇč a kanatar~…ĺ masakaputaj **** amińß ¶aan idaw ku pat…ô ¶…ôk nuńß…ôni tu "sapisikur~…ĺ tu kitakit nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčwan atu mu ¶…ôr~…ĺakaj a nisub…ôr~…ĺitan azajsaŇč nikasasur~…ĺit" kitakit sub…ôr~…ĺidtan a zajsaŇč mutudu Ē~ ° tu tad…ômaw idawku tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu mu ¶…ôr~…ĺakaj a sar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ nu nisub…ôr~…ĺidan a zajsaŇč nu sapamata . ńßina adińßaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu nisub…ôr~…ĺidtan a zajsaŇč pasu mar~…ĺumanaj " u nisaŇčaan ar~…ĺuma Ē~ °, nar~…ĺimaan misaŇč tu ¶an ¶anan, usur~…ĺit" masar~…ĺujar~…ĺujaj a r~…ĺumar~…ĺumaan, nisub…ôr~…ĺudan a kitidaan, " nikutkutan a kitidaan" u ¶…ôr~…ĺak sananaj a nisub…ôr~…ĺitanwijni sa u mi ¶id…ôkaj a ¶an ¶anan atu maudipaj nu sisapir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺaj nu mu ¶…ôr~…ĺakaj a kitidaan nu wajwaj , u r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° atu mu ¶…ôr~…ĺakaj nu kitidaan masasuar~…ĺa; "u tańßinaaj tu a ¶anan nu kitidaan nu ¶an ¶anan" at uk…ô-sij,sapisikur~…ĺ, mu ¶…ôr~…ĺakaj u baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ nida idaw namiŇč ku sapir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ nu niw ¶i . amir~…ĺika naji **** a mińß ¶aan ** abur~…ĺad * ad…ômiad patu ¶…ôk sa tinakawaw masasur~…ĺit , ina kanatar~…ĺ nu ¶…ôr~…ĺakaj atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu masub…ôr~…ĺidaj a kitidaan kju idaw ku kas…ôn…ôgan mi ¶umud i " kitakit nu tuŇčus siŇčaŇčanaj" . **** amińß ¶aan *abur~…ĺad , tini i ńßuwa-s…ôn-tun-k…ô-r~…ĺun-pi-ja sapasubana Ē~ ° a ¶uda nu masakaputaj nu kitakit nisub…ôr~…ĺidan tu zajsaŇč a wij-jun- ńßuj sakinatusa mir~…ĺubaŇč , u amir~…ĺika sajawaj misur~…ĺur~…ĺ tu tusaaj a zajsaŇč nu nisub…ôr~…ĺitan amaar~…ĺa "kitakitzajsaŇč nu siŇčaŇčanaj" mar~…ĺa ¶ar~…ĺ tu ńßu-t…ô-taj-ti- nu kanatar~…ĺ aaidaŇčan atu takur~…ĺijawaj aaidaŇčan . katukuńßajda **** amińß ¶aan , u amir~…ĺika idaw ku ** akitidaan nu aaidaŇčan makaar~…ĺatu kitakit nu nisub…ôr~…ĺitan a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a nisub…ôr~…ĺitan a *ajsaŇč, ** ku ¶iit mu ¶…ôr~…ĺakaj nusub…ôr~…ĺutan , aaj mapapur~…ĺuŇč ku ni sub…ôr~…ĺitan a zajsaŇč . sabar~…ĺińßajaj a maar~…ĺaaj tini i pu-r~…ĺi-ńß…ôŇč nu mu-r~…ĺa-wij-ja a kitidaan u mir~…ĺakuwijtaj a nisub…ôr~…ĺitan a zajsaŇč , **** amińß ¶aan mapatu ¶…ôk tu . ina kanatar~…ĺ idaw ** ku niar~…ĺ…ôsan a zajsaŇč maar~…ĺaaj atu mipar~…ĺasur~…ĺ a situŇčusaj . takur~…ĺijawaj aaidaŇčan naji **** amińß ¶aan katukuńß **** amińß ¶aan mapa ¶umud " amar~…ĺawp…ôsaj a nisub…ôr~…ĺidan nu kitakit a zajsaŇč patuŇčusan tu ŇčaŇčan" nadikudan sa ar~…ĺ…ôsan na ¶a , u tabakiaj a r~…ĺanur~…ĺanu Ē~ °an naji **** amińß ¶aan katukuńß **** amińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa amar~…ĺawp…ôsaj tu , nadikudan sa ¶aaja ¶a pusijawi ; nika i **** amińß ¶aan , nu aaidaŇča u nanum atu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj matur~…ĺin mańßi ¶a ńßakija , pasajni tu i baju Ē~ ° kuni ¶…ôr~…ĺakan mir~…ĺa…ô ¶us tu nikaudip nu baju Ē~ °aj a ¶a ¶anan , kju u sapasubana Ē~ ° nu masakaputaj r~…ĺuŇču ¶an nu amir~…ĺika a sijńßu ja aaidaŇčan mar~…ĺa u amar~…ĺawp…ôsaj tu sa , matur~…ĺin katukuńß ajda . . u sur~…ĺsur~…ĺdaan a aaidaŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ ******* aaidaŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ sur~…ĺsur~…ĺdaan "gr~…ĺa ¶i…ôr baj nationar~…ĺ park" kitidaan nu par~…ĺa *** …ômaŇč a kubu , paasu masar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺunaj maŇčaŇčiwaj a bujubuju Ē~ °an , u musauŇčajaj a sur~…ĺsur~…ĺdaan , udińß…ôkuaj a ńßinaudadaj a kur~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan , aadupan nu dadipasan tu ir~…ĺabuaj nu baju Ē~ ° , u sapar~…ĺikat tu nu ar~…ĺas…ô ¶ija nu r~…ĺabuaj a dadan . . tiniaj aaidaŇčan u nu kitakit ¶…ôr~…ĺak sananaj a nisub…ôr~…ĺidtan a zajsaŇč kujni , ina nisub…ôr~…ĺidtan a zasaŇč u par~…ĺanida **** a kubu , nu kitakit satabakiaj a nu kanatar~…ĺ a sasikur~…ĺan a kitidaan nu ¶a ¶ajaj . . s…ôn-ji-r~…ĺaj-ja-s…ô "idaw ku sur~…ĺit; s…ôn-aj-r~…ĺi-ja-s…ô atu s…ônji-r~…ĺi-ja-s…ô" janikasapu Ē~ ° ¶u nu bujubuju Ē~ °an , atu nikatatuŇčdu nu bujubuju Ē~ °an , baŇča ¶ar~…ĺ aadińßan inajajtu kumańßiniaj kakapańß, sisa mańßini kju u tidiŇč nu bujubuju Ē~ °an nu di ¶…ôm sakatar~…ĺawan ku tar~…ĺakaw nida , mipuut tu namaka taj-pin-jaŇčaj a nika su…ôm…ôt nu bar~…ĺi a d…ômiad , kju nikasaupu nu sur~…ĺda tar~…ĺakaw, kja mar~…ĺasur~…ĺsur~…ĺdaan maminkutuŇčdu nu buju Ē~ °, sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶ sa ku tuŇčudu nu buju Ē~ ° kapańß aadińßan . r~…ĺank…ôr~…ĺ-s…ônajr~…ĺijas…ô a kanatar~…ĺ nu aaidaŇčan atu sasikur~…ĺan " kamu nu amir~…ĺika; wraŇč…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ*st. …ôr~…ĺias nationar~…ĺ park and pr…ôs…ôr*…ô" , tini i amir~…ĺika ar~…ĺas…ô ¶ij nu kanatar~…ĺ a aidaŇčan , nipatid…ôŇčan i **** a mińß ¶aan , u satabakiaj nu amir~…ĺika aaidaŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ, **,*** ¶ubu a kur~…ĺi ku ańß…ôbar~…ĺ mar~…ĺakuwit ku takur~…ĺijawaj a kanatar~…ĺ nu aaidaŇčan nu …ôn…ôm nu tar~…ĺakaw . :wraŇč…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ*st. …ôr~…ĺias nationar~…ĺ park andpr…ôs…ôr*…ô), . r~…ĺank…ôr~…ĺ-s…ônajr~…ĺijas…ô a kanatar~…ĺ atu sar~…ĺaadan tu duma nu kanata-k…ôr~…ĺuwani a kanatar~…ĺ nu aaidaŇčan atu nir~…ĺiwanan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ńßan nu pur~…ĺuŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ nimutudu Ē~ ° mar~…ĺa kitakit nu nisub…ôr~…ĺidan a zajsaŇč . aaidaŇčan naw bukbukr~…ĺar~…ĺan kujadańßaj, sisa u tajniaj midaŇč ¶akadajum . . idaw ku tu adadan ¶ajaj ńß…ônaj tamakai u ba Ē~ °ba Ē~ °tuwan ńß…ônaj nika katukuńß iaaidaŇčan , ¶aj kańßini a ¶a ¶aj u katuudaj a r~…ĺabaŇč sa u ńßikuki kuka ¶awan nuńß…ôni. r~…ĺank…ôr~…ĺ-s…ônajr~…ĺijas…ô a kanatar~…ĺ nu aaidaŇčan ja ŇčaŇčan namakaj ¶a namakj nu amir~…ĺika sakatusa a tar~…ĺakw , u tar~…ĺakaw sa *,*** a d…ôpańß nu s…ônaj-r~…ĺija a buju . ***- . r~…ĺabu nu aaisaŇčan idaw ku tabakiaj aadupan , sur~…ĺsur~…ĺdaan, bar~…ĺad atu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a buju Ē~ ° mańßini kuj tiniaj a kaku nu buju Ē~ ° . .
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Kelun/lankel-senayliyase/pin-cuwan-wan/tacinsini-alsayke nilaculan Kelun/lankel-senayliyase/pin-cuwan-wan/tacinsini-alsayke "kamu nu ing-ku: luane / Wrangell-St Elias / Glacier Bay / Tatshenshini-Alsek" u milakuwitay tu nu kanatal asi-tung . (ŤčĪŤ™ě:Kluane / Wrangell-St Elias / Glacier Bay / Tatshenshini-Alsek) . u eneng nida i amilika atu kanata nu lilis nu yi-kung , alaseciya, atu pulitin-ke-lunpiya a kitidaan. tinisa idaw ku tatelunan nu sulsuldaan a sapilacil atu tatangahan nu sulsuldaan tu aadihan , imahinisa idawku yadahay a kasienawan a adupan atu macelahay a tumay ngabul tabakiay ku ngawa aside tini naming mueneg , 1979 amihcaan , pulung nu kanatal u sapasubana u masakaputay nisubelidan a masakaputay wiyni sa apacumuden i kitakit nu helak sananay a nusubelidan a zaysang . u hamin nu ahebal nu pala sa 32,000,000 a ing-mu "130,000 acubu nu kuli mikaka aca . pakayni nu pulung a kanatal masakaputay 1972 amihcaan idaw ku patecek nuheni tu "sapisikul tu kitakit nu lalangwan atu mucelakay a nisubelitan azaysang nikasasulit" kitakit subelidtan a zaysang mutudu' tu tademaw idawku tatelungan nu lalangawan atu mucelakay a salacul nu nisubelidan a zaysang nu sapamata . hina adihay a lalangawan nu nisubelidtan a zaysang pasu malumanay " u nisangaan aluma', nalimaan misang tu cancanan, usulit" masaluyaluyay a lumalumaan, nisubeludan a kitidaan, " nikutkutan a kitidaan" u celak sananay a nisubelitanwiyni sa u micidekay a cancanan atu maudipay nu sisapilaculay nu mucelakay a kitidaan nu wayway , u lala' atu mucelakay nu kitidaan masasuala; "u tahinaay tu a canan nu kitidaan nu cancanan" at uke-siy,sapisikul, mucelakay u bangcal nida idaw naming ku sapilacul nu niwci . Amilika nayi 1973 a mihcaan 12 abulad 7 ademiad patucek sa tinakawaw masasulit , ina kanatal nucelakay atu lalangawan nu masubeliday a kitidaan kyu idaw ku kasenegan micumud i " kitakit nu tungus singanganay" . 1978 amihcaan 9abulad , tini i huwa-sen-tun-ke-lun-pi-ya sapasubana' acuda nu masakaputay nu kitakit nisubelidan tu zaysang a wiy-yun- huy sakinatusa milubang , u amilika sayaway misulul tu tusaay a zaysang nu nisubelitan amaala "kitakitzaysang nu singanganay" malacal tu hu-te-tay-ti- nu kanatal aaidangan atu takuliyaway aaidangan . katukuhayda 2024 amihcaan , u amilika idaw ku 26 akitidaan nu aaidangan makaalatu kitakit nu nisubelitan a lalangawan a nisubelitan a xaysang, 12 ku ciit mucelakay nusubelutan , aay mapapulung ku ni subelitan a zaysang . sabalihayay a maalaay tini i pu-li-heng nu mu-la-wiy-ya a kitidaan u milakuwiytay a nisubelitan a zaysang , 2024 amihcaan mapatucek tu . ina kanatal idaw 17 ku nialesan a zaysang maalaay atu mipalasul a situngusay . takuliyaway aaidangan nayi 1995 amihcaan katukuh 2003 amihcaan mapacumud " amalawpesay a nisubelidan nu kitakit a zaysang patungusan tu ngangan" nadikudan sa alesan naca , u tabakiay a lanulanu'an nayi 1993 amihcaan katukuh 2007 amihcaan mala amalawpesay tu , nadikudan sa caayaca pusiyawi ; nika i 2010 amihcaan , nu aaidanga u nanum atu mulangaway matulin mahica hakiya , pasayni tu i bayu' kunicelakan milaecus tu nikaudip nu bayu'ay a cacanan , kyu u sapasubana' nu masakaputay lungucan nu amilika a siyhu ya aaidangan mala u amalawpesay tu sa , matulin katukuh ayda . . u sulsuldaan a aaidangan nu kanatal ŚÜįŚ∑ĚÁĀ£ŚúčŚģ∂ŚÖ¨Śúí aaidangan nu kanatal sulsuldaan "Glacier Bay National Park" kitidaan nu pala 330 emang a kubu , paasu masalikelunay mangangiway a buyubuyu'an , u musaungayay a sulsuldaan , udihekuay a hinaudaday a kulakilangan , aadupan nu dadipasan tu ilabuay nu bayu' , u sapalikat tu nu alaseciya nu labuay a dadan . . tiniay aaidangan u nu kitakit celak sananay a nisubelidtan a zaysang kuyni , ina nisubelidtan a zasang u palanida 2500 a kubu , nu kitakit satabakiay a nu kanatal a sasikulan a kitidaan nu cacayay . . sen-yi-lay-ya-se "idaw ku sulit; sen-ay-li-ya-se atu senyi-li-ya-se" yanikasapu'cu nu buyubuyu'an , atu nikatatungdu nu buyubuyu'an , bangacal aadihan inayaytu kumahiniay kakapah, sisa mahini kyu u tiding nu buyubuyu'an nu dicem sakatalawan ku talakaw nida , mipuut tu namaka tay-pin-yangay a nika suemet nu bali a demiad , kyu nikasaupu nu sulda talakaw, kya malasulsuldaan maminkutungdu nu buyu', salengac sa ku tungudu nu buyu' kapah aadihan . lankel-senayliyase a kanatal nu aaidangan atu sasikulan " kamu nu amilika; Wrangell‚ÄďSt. Elias National Park and Preserve" , tini i amilika alaseciy nu kanatal a aidangan , nipatidengan i 1980 a mihcaan , u satabakiay nu amilika aaidangan nu kanatal, 53,321 cubu a kuli ku ahebal malakuwit ku takuliyaway a kanatal nu aaidangan nu enem nu talakaw . :Wrangell‚ÄďSt. Elias National Park andPreserve), . lankel-senayliyase a kanatal atu salaadan tu duma nu Kanata-keluwani a kanatal nu aaidangan atu niliwanan a lala palecad han nu pulung nu kanatal nimutudu' mala kitakit nu nisubelidan a zaysang . aaidangan naw bukbuklalan kuyadahay, sisa u tayniay midang cakadayum . . idaw ku tu adadan cayay henay tamakai u ba'ba'tuwan henay nika katukuh iaaidangan , cay kahini acacay u katuuday a labang sa u hikuki kukacawan nuheni. lankel-senayliyase a kanatal nu aaidangan ya ngangan namakayca namaky nu amilika sakatusa a talakw , u talakaw sa 5,489 a depah nu senay-liya a buyu . Ťė≠ś†ľÁąĺ- . labu nu aaisangan idaw ku tabakiay aadupan , sulsuldaan, balad atu silamalay a buyu' mahini kuy tiniay a kaku nu buyu' . .

(**:kr~…ĺuan…ô / wraŇč…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ-st …ôr~…ĺias / gr~…ĺa ¶i…ôr baj / tatsńß…ônsńßini-ar~…ĺs…ôk) . u …ôn…ôŇč nida i amir~…ĺika atu kanata nu r~…ĺir~…ĺis nu ji-kuŇč , ar~…ĺas…ô ¶ija, atu pur~…ĺitin-k…ô-r~…ĺunpija a kitidaan. tinisa idaw ku tat…ôr~…ĺunan nu sur~…ĺsur~…ĺdaan a sapir~…ĺa ¶ir~…ĺ atu tataŇčańßan nu sur~…ĺsur~…ĺdaan tu aadińßan , imańßinisa idawku jadańßaj a kasi…ônawan a adupan atu ma ¶…ôr~…ĺańßaj a tumaj Ňčabur~…ĺ tabakiaj ku Ňčawa asid…ô tini namiŇč mu…ôn…ôg , **** amińß ¶aan , pur~…ĺuŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ u sapasubana u masakaputaj nisub…ôr~…ĺidan a masakaputaj wijni sa apa ¶umud…ôn i kitakit nu ńß…ôr~…ĺak sananaj a nusub…ôr~…ĺidan a zajsaŇč . u ńßamin nu ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu par~…ĺa sa **,***,*** a iŇč-mu "***,*** a ¶ubu nu kur~…ĺi mikaka a ¶a . pakajni nu pur~…ĺuŇč a kanatar~…ĺ masakaputaj **** amińß ¶aan idaw ku pat…ô ¶…ôk nuńß…ôni tu "sapisikur~…ĺ tu kitakit nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčwan atu mu ¶…ôr~…ĺakaj a nisub…ôr~…ĺitan azajsaŇč nikasasur~…ĺit" kitakit sub…ôr~…ĺidtan a zajsaŇč mutudu Ē~ ° tu tad…ômaw idawku tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu mu ¶…ôr~…ĺakaj a sar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ nu nisub…ôr~…ĺidan a zajsaŇč nu sapamata . ńßina adińßaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu nisub…ôr~…ĺidtan a zajsaŇč pasu mar~…ĺumanaj " u nisaŇčaan ar~…ĺuma Ē~ °, nar~…ĺimaan misaŇč tu ¶an ¶anan, usur~…ĺit" masar~…ĺujar~…ĺujaj a r~…ĺumar~…ĺumaan, nisub…ôr~…ĺudan a kitidaan, " nikutkutan a kitidaan" u ¶…ôr~…ĺak sananaj a nisub…ôr~…ĺitanwijni sa u mi ¶id…ôkaj a ¶an ¶anan atu maudipaj nu sisapir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺaj nu mu ¶…ôr~…ĺakaj a kitidaan nu wajwaj , u r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° atu mu ¶…ôr~…ĺakaj nu kitidaan masasuar~…ĺa; "u tańßinaaj tu a ¶anan nu kitidaan nu ¶an ¶anan" at uk…ô-sij,sapisikur~…ĺ, mu ¶…ôr~…ĺakaj u baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ nida idaw namiŇč ku sapir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ nu niw ¶i . amir~…ĺika naji **** a mińß ¶aan ** abur~…ĺad * ad…ômiad patu ¶…ôk sa tinakawaw masasur~…ĺit , ina kanatar~…ĺ nu ¶…ôr~…ĺakaj atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu masub…ôr~…ĺidaj a kitidaan kju idaw ku kas…ôn…ôgan mi ¶umud i " kitakit nu tuŇčus siŇčaŇčanaj" . **** amińß ¶aan *abur~…ĺad , tini i ńßuwa-s…ôn-tun-k…ô-r~…ĺun-pi-ja sapasubana Ē~ ° a ¶uda nu masakaputaj nu kitakit nisub…ôr~…ĺidan tu zajsaŇč a wij-jun- ńßuj sakinatusa mir~…ĺubaŇč , u amir~…ĺika sajawaj misur~…ĺur~…ĺ tu tusaaj a zajsaŇč nu nisub…ôr~…ĺitan amaar~…ĺa "kitakitzajsaŇč nu siŇčaŇčanaj" mar~…ĺa ¶ar~…ĺ tu ńßu-t…ô-taj-ti- nu kanatar~…ĺ aaidaŇčan atu takur~…ĺijawaj aaidaŇčan . katukuńßajda **** amińß ¶aan , u amir~…ĺika idaw ku ** akitidaan nu aaidaŇčan makaar~…ĺatu kitakit nu nisub…ôr~…ĺitan a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a nisub…ôr~…ĺitan a *ajsaŇč, ** ku ¶iit mu ¶…ôr~…ĺakaj nusub…ôr~…ĺutan , aaj mapapur~…ĺuŇč ku ni sub…ôr~…ĺitan a zajsaŇč . sabar~…ĺińßajaj a maar~…ĺaaj tini i pu-r~…ĺi-ńß…ôŇč nu mu-r~…ĺa-wij-ja a kitidaan u mir~…ĺakuwijtaj a nisub…ôr~…ĺitan a zajsaŇč , **** amińß ¶aan mapatu ¶…ôk tu . ina kanatar~…ĺ idaw ** ku niar~…ĺ…ôsan a zajsaŇč maar~…ĺaaj atu mipar~…ĺasur~…ĺ a situŇčusaj . takur~…ĺijawaj aaidaŇčan naji **** amińß ¶aan katukuńß **** amińß ¶aan mapa ¶umud " amar~…ĺawp…ôsaj a nisub…ôr~…ĺidan nu kitakit a zajsaŇč patuŇčusan tu ŇčaŇčan" nadikudan sa ar~…ĺ…ôsan na ¶a , u tabakiaj a r~…ĺanur~…ĺanu Ē~ °an naji **** amińß ¶aan katukuńß **** amińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa amar~…ĺawp…ôsaj tu , nadikudan sa ¶aaja ¶a pusijawi ; nika i **** amińß ¶aan , nu aaidaŇča u nanum atu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj matur~…ĺin mańßi ¶a ńßakija , pasajni tu i baju Ē~ ° kuni ¶…ôr~…ĺakan mir~…ĺa…ô ¶us tu nikaudip nu baju Ē~ °aj a ¶a ¶anan , kju u sapasubana Ē~ ° nu masakaputaj r~…ĺuŇču ¶an nu amir~…ĺika a sijńßu ja aaidaŇčan mar~…ĺa u amar~…ĺawp…ôsaj tu sa , matur~…ĺin katukuńß ajda . . u sur~…ĺsur~…ĺdaan a aaidaŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ ******* aaidaŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ sur~…ĺsur~…ĺdaan "gr~…ĺa ¶i…ôr baj nationar~…ĺ park" kitidaan nu par~…ĺa *** …ômaŇč a kubu , paasu masar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺunaj maŇčaŇčiwaj a bujubuju Ē~ °an , u musauŇčajaj a sur~…ĺsur~…ĺdaan , udińß…ôkuaj a ńßinaudadaj a kur~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan , aadupan nu dadipasan tu ir~…ĺabuaj nu baju Ē~ ° , u sapar~…ĺikat tu nu ar~…ĺas…ô ¶ija nu r~…ĺabuaj a dadan . . tiniaj aaidaŇčan u nu kitakit ¶…ôr~…ĺak sananaj a nisub…ôr~…ĺidtan a zajsaŇč kujni , ina nisub…ôr~…ĺidtan a zasaŇč u par~…ĺanida **** a kubu , nu kitakit satabakiaj a nu kanatar~…ĺ a sasikur~…ĺan a kitidaan nu ¶a ¶ajaj . . s…ôn-ji-r~…ĺaj-ja-s…ô "idaw ku sur~…ĺit; s…ôn-aj-r~…ĺi-ja-s…ô atu s…ônji-r~…ĺi-ja-s…ô" janikasapu Ē~ ° ¶u nu bujubuju Ē~ °an , atu nikatatuŇčdu nu bujubuju Ē~ °an , baŇča ¶ar~…ĺ aadińßan inajajtu kumańßiniaj kakapańß, sisa mańßini kju u tidiŇč nu bujubuju Ē~ °an nu di ¶…ôm sakatar~…ĺawan ku tar~…ĺakaw nida , mipuut tu namaka taj-pin-jaŇčaj a nika su…ôm…ôt nu bar~…ĺi a d…ômiad , kju nikasaupu nu sur~…ĺda tar~…ĺakaw, kja mar~…ĺasur~…ĺsur~…ĺdaan maminkutuŇčdu nu buju Ē~ °, sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶ sa ku tuŇčudu nu buju Ē~ ° kapańß aadińßan . r~…ĺank…ôr~…ĺ-s…ônajr~…ĺijas…ô a kanatar~…ĺ nu aaidaŇčan atu sasikur~…ĺan " kamu nu amir~…ĺika; wraŇč…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ*st. …ôr~…ĺias nationar~…ĺ park and pr…ôs…ôr*…ô" , tini i amir~…ĺika ar~…ĺas…ô ¶ij nu kanatar~…ĺ a aidaŇčan , nipatid…ôŇčan i **** a mińß ¶aan , u satabakiaj nu amir~…ĺika aaidaŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ, **,*** ¶ubu a kur~…ĺi ku ańß…ôbar~…ĺ mar~…ĺakuwit ku takur~…ĺijawaj a kanatar~…ĺ nu aaidaŇčan nu …ôn…ôm nu tar~…ĺakaw . :wraŇč…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ*st. …ôr~…ĺias nationar~…ĺ park andpr…ôs…ôr*…ô), . r~…ĺank…ôr~…ĺ-s…ônajr~…ĺijas…ô a kanatar~…ĺ atu sar~…ĺaadan tu duma nu kanata-k…ôr~…ĺuwani a kanatar~…ĺ nu aaidaŇčan atu nir~…ĺiwanan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ńßan nu pur~…ĺuŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ nimutudu Ē~ ° mar~…ĺa kitakit nu nisub…ôr~…ĺidan a zajsaŇč . aaidaŇčan naw bukbukr~…ĺar~…ĺan kujadańßaj, sisa u tajniaj midaŇč ¶akadajum . . idaw ku tu adadan ¶ajaj ńß…ônaj tamakai u ba Ē~ °ba Ē~ °tuwan ńß…ônaj nika katukuńß iaaidaŇčan , ¶aj kańßini a ¶a ¶aj u katuudaj a r~…ĺabaŇč sa u ńßikuki kuka ¶awan nuńß…ôni. r~…ĺank…ôr~…ĺ-s…ônajr~…ĺijas…ô a kanatar~…ĺ nu aaidaŇčan ja ŇčaŇčan namakaj ¶a namakj nu amir~…ĺika sakatusa a tar~…ĺakw , u tar~…ĺakaw sa *,*** a d…ôpańß nu s…ônaj-r~…ĺija a buju . ***- . r~…ĺabu nu aaisaŇčan idaw ku tabakiaj aadupan , sur~…ĺsur~…ĺdaan, bar~…ĺad atu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a buju Ē~ ° mańßini kuj tiniaj a kaku nu buju Ē~ ° . .
